name: Mango-Pineapple-Lime Cheesecake
recipeIngredient: 1 small Pineapple, peeled, quartered, cored, thinly sliced, leaves reserved.
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Generously butter a 9-inch springform pan with 2 3/4 inch high sides using the melted unsalted butter.
3. Finely grind the first four crust ingredients in a food processor.
4. Add the butter and blend until crumbs are moistened.
5. Press the mixture evenly on the bottom and up the sides of the prepared pan.
6. Bake until the crust is set, about 8 minutes. Transfer to a rack; cool.
7. Keep the oven temperature while cooling the crust.
8. In a large bowl, beat the cream cheese, sugar, and lime peel with an electric mixer until light and fluffy.
9. Beat in the sour cream and lime juice. Add eggs one at a time, beating just until blended.
10. Pour the filling into the crust.
11. Bake until the edges are firm but the center is still slightly jiggly when the pan is shaken, about 1 hour 20 minutes.
12. Transfer to a rack and cool for 10 minutes.
13. Run a sharp knife around the pan sides to loosen the cake.
14. Cover; chill overnight.
15. Arrange mango slices around the top edge of the cake.
16. Place kiwi in the center, followed by pineapple.
17. Garnish with pineapple leaves.
